findings.issue: Race condition in sliding window: read and decrement are not atomic, allowing burst requests to bypass the limit under concurrent load
findings.suggestion: Use Redis MULTI/EXEC transaction or Lua script to make the check-and-decrement atomic

findings.issue: Default rate limit of 10000 requests/minute is too permissive for public endpoints
findings.suggestion: Set default to 100 requests/minute with per-endpoint override capability

findings.issue: Test uses real timers which makes the sliding window test flaky
findings.suggestion: Use Jest fake timers to control time advancement deterministically
